project.title: Identification of the CFAP65 interactome from mouse testis
project.projectDescription: Cfap65 was immunoprecipitated from mouse testis to identify the interactome of this protein for further functional studies.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: CFAP65 was immunoprecipitated from mouse testis with CFAP65 antibody described above, and IgG antibody was used as negative control. Eluates were precipitated with five volumes of -20°C pre-chilled acetone followed by trypsin digestion. Trypsin peptide mixtures were injected automatically and loaded into the analytical column (Acclaim PepMap C18, 75 μm x 25 cm; Thermo Fisher Scientific). Before subsequent analysis, the eluted peptides were separated by linear gradient.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: LC-MS/MS analysis was performed on EASY-nanoLC 1000 system (Thermo Fisher Scientific) coupled to an Orbitrap Fusion Tribrid mass spectrometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific) by a nano spray ion source.

references.referenceLine: Chen J, Ren C, Zhao S, Wu H, Wang J, Dong Y, Liu S, Pan Y, Xiao Z, Yang S, Zhang J, Liu M. CFAP65 is essential for C2a projection integrity in axonemes: implications for organ-specific ciliary dysfunction and infertility. Cell Mol Life Sci. 2025 82(1):61
